name: sql-ssis-databricks-accelerator
description: Modernise any SQL Server, SSIS, or Azure Synapse codebase to Databricks. Parses, analyses, converts, and deploys. Works against any source repository.

tools.name: parse_source
tools.description: Parse any source repo and extract all SQL/SSIS objects

tools.name: convert_sql
tools.description: Convert SQL Server / Synapse objects to Databricks

tools.name: convert_ssis
tools.description: Convert SSIS packages to Databricks Workflows and PySpark

tools.name: generate_bundle
tools.description: Generate a Databricks Asset Bundle for deployment

tools.name: run_validation
tools.description: End-to-end validation of all conversion outputs

resources.description: List of available skill prompt files

prompts.name: run_full_pipeline
prompts.description: Ready-to-use prompt to run the full pipeline
